title: HelloWorld Enhanced
description: A lightweight Hello World SMP modpack with shaders, resource packs.
body:
---

## 🌍 HelloWorld SMP – Modded Minecraft 

**HelloWorld SMP** is a lightweight modpack built for a cozy, community-driven Survival Multiplayer experience.
Originally started by three players — **ChickenJMC**, **Ayuzz**, and **DargoTamber** — this pack brings visual upgrades and quality-of-life improvements while keeping the spirit of vanilla Minecraft alive.

---

### ✨ Features

* ✔️ **Minecraft Java**
* 🖼️ **Resource packs** and **shader support** for better visuals
* 🔧 **Client-side & minor server-side mods** to enhance gameplay
* ⚙️ Optimized for multiplayer performance
* 💬 Active community via Discord

---

### 🔗 Server Access

We have a public server running this exact modpack!
